name: pincer
description: A four-tier autonomous maintainer loop for OpenClaw: Mission (audit & plan) → Goal (triage) → Control (orchestrate) → Agent (Codex/Claude Code) → Sandbox (Crabbox) → Tool. Frontier-model plans, mid-tier executes, sandboxed verification before every PR.

skills.name: audit-and-plan
skills.description: Mission tier. Frontier-model (Opus) repo audit that reads code, CI, dependencies, and changelog, then writes a structured TOML plan of priorities, dependencies, and verification paths to plans/<repo>-<date>.toml. Pattern credit: shadcn /improve.

skills.name: triage
skills.description: Goal tier. Hourly classifier (Sonnet) that merges the current plan with the live GitHub queue and emits a URL-first triage report bucketed as Autonomous / Needs-owner / Defer. Pattern credit: steipete github-project-triage.

skills.name: orchestrator
skills.description: Control tier. Persistent (5-minute cadence) ledger that dispatches autonomous items to Codex-primary/Claude-Code-fallback worker subagents, gates every worker output through a `crabbox run` verdict on a clean throwaway VM, and only opens PRs on green sandbox runs. Pattern credit: steipete maintainer-orchestrator + nathan loop hierarchy.

skills.name: keeper
skills.description: Meta-runner. Single-command `keeper run <repo>` invocation that drives the full Mission → Goal → Control pipeline against a configured repo allowlist using sane defaults from config.toml. The ergonomic surface for daily use.
